scripts.db:init:local: npm run cf:config && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config .wrangler/generated/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:init:remote: npm run cf:config && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config .wrangler/generated/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.build: npm run cf-typegen && npm run check && npm run db:init:local
scripts.deploy: npm run build && node ./scripts/apply-remote-d1-migrations-if-possible.mjs && wrangler deploy --keep-vars --config .wrangler/generated/wrangler.jsonc && node ./scripts/apply-remote-d1-migrations-if-possible.mjs
